top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_category,
    d_year,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN catalog_sales ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk AND cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_sales ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
GROUP BY ...

SELECT 
    i_category,
    d_year,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales

    web_sales
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN catalog_sales ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk AND cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_sales ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE

WITH sales_by_category AS (
    SELECT 
        i_category,
        d_year,
        d_month_seq,
        SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales,
        0.0 AS catalog_sales,
        0.0 AS store_sales
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
    GROUP BY i_category, d_year, d_month_seq
